reasoning: Caruana's known FIDE rating on October 16, 2025, is 2789. Because the Wikipedia page for FIDE rankings mirrors the official monthly FIDE standard rating lists, the baseline value on October 26 will be exactly 2789. A 1% increase requires his rating to reach at least 2816.89 (so rounded to 2817). Caruana has not been rated 2817+ in several years. Gaining 28 Elo points at his level requires scoring approximately +3 or +4 above expected results against elite competition (since the K-factor is 10, meaning roughly +2.8 points performance above expected score). Achieving this within a single month's rating period is historically rare, estimating around <5%. Therefore, the probability for November 2 and November 25 is minimal (set to the lowest allowed boundary of 0.05). By January 2026, he has a slightly longer window of 3 months to go on an exceptional streak and gain those points, which justifies slightly increasing the probability to 0.08 to account for time horizon uncertainty.
